domain: SI national GERK parcel layer (Identifikacijski sistem za zemljisca Blok/GERK, open data)
notes: Yearly-vintage open-data layer; 856677 records; attributes GERK_PID, RABA_ID, AREA, OPIS_RABE, ENGLISH (no domace ime, no BLOK-ID, no NUP/GrPov). Round-trip verified 2026-06-12: 4/4 known-farm PIDs matched, 0 duplicates. Layer may lag a fresher RKG izpis; discrepancies route to review.
